---
title: "Weekly Cargo Cleaning"
author: "Sakina Lord"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("~/Desktop/478C_Capstone/CAPPY/Data"))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
```

# load data
```{r}
# Grab all weekly fies from directory
files <- list.files(path = "./Rail_Service_Data/", pattern = "\\.xlsx$")
# Sort filenames by which years are correcly formatted v.s. not

# initialize an empty file for them all to read into
weekly_cargo_data <- tibble()

for  (i in 1:length(files)){
  print(i)
  filename = paste("./Rail_Service_Data/" , files[i], sep = '')
  print(filename)
  if(str_detect(filename, "%")){
      company <- str_extract(filename, "[A-Z]{2,}")

      week <- str_extract(filename, "\\d{4}_\\d{2}_\\d{2}") %>%
        str_replace_all("_", "-") %>% as.Date("%Y-%m-%d")
      
      print.Date(week, format = "%Y-%m-%d")
      year <- as.numeric(format(week, "%Y"))
      
      print(paste(c("reading", week, company), sep = " "))

      if (company == "CN" && (week != as.Date("2025-09-03", format = "%Y-%m-%d"))) {
        range <- "B9:E31"}
      else{
        if(company == "NS" && (week == as.Date("2021-06-30"))){
          range <- "B14:E36"
        }
        else {range <- "B8:E30"}
      }
      
      if(){
        range <- "B7:D31"
        
      }
      else{
        temp <- read_xlsx(filename,
                        sheet = 5,
                        range = range)
      }
      print(head(temp))

      temp <- temp %>% mutate(Year = year,
                              Week = week,
                              Company = company)
      weekly_cargo_data <- rbind(temp, weekly_cargo_data)
  }
  else {print("File not of correct format, skipping")}
}

# 963

```


```{r}
# Export
write.csv(weekly_cargo_data, file = "Weekly_Cargo_Data_2023_2026.csv")
```
